full_text:
Wen Sheng 温生
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wen Sheng (温生)was born in Unlisted. Made Marquis Within the Passes following his father Wen Hui’s death. The line was extinguished after his own early death. Wen Sheng was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
